tool_args.label: Bus bunching on 125th Street
tool_args.raw_text: Bus bunching is an issue. It occurs often on the M60 (during the AM peak period) and is most evident on 125th Street at Adam Clayton Powell Boulevard, Frederick Douglass Boulevard, Madison and Lexington Avenues.

payload.claim_text: Bus bunching is an issue. It occurs often on the M60 (during the AM peak period) and is most evident on 125th Street at Adam Clayton Powell Boulevard, Frederick Douglass Boulevard, Madison and Lexington Avenues.
payload.subject: Bus operations on 125th Street

tool_args.label: M60 bus unreliable
tool_args.raw_text: M60 is unreliable, service is slow and unpredictable.

payload.claim_text: M60 is unreliable, service is slow and unpredictable.

warnings: claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

tool_args.label: Buses delayed by red lights, traffic congestion, turning vehicles
tool_args.raw_text: Buses are often delayed by: - Red lights - Traffic congestion Between Adam Clayton Powell Jr. Boulevard and St. Nicholas Avenue (particularly a problem for the M60 bus). Rush hour traffic at the Robert F. Kennedy Bridge slows the buses. Vehicles turning off of and onto 125th Street restrict traffic flow and delay buses.

payload.claim_text: Buses are often delayed by red lights, traffic congestion between Adam Clayton Powell Jr. Boulevard and St. Nicholas Avenue (particularly a problem for the M60 bus), rush hour traffic at the Robert F. Kennedy Bridge, and vehicles turning off of and onto 125th Street.
payload.subject: Bus delays on 125th Street

tool_args.label: Double parking issues on 125th Street
tool_args.raw_text: Double parking is an issue throughout the corridor, especially at: Between St. Nicholas Avenue and Malcolm X Boulevard. At the Pathmark supermarket between Lexington and Third Avenues.

payload.claim_text: Double parking is an issue throughout the corridor, especially between St. Nicholas Avenue and Malcolm X Boulevard, and at the Pathmark supermarket between Lexington and Third Avenues.
payload.subject: Parking on 125th Street

tool_args.label: Pedestrian safety concerns on 125th Street
tool_args.raw_text: Pedestrian safety is of great concern. There has been an increase in pedestrian injuries and fatalities in recent years.

payload.claim_text: Pedestrian safety is of great concern. There has been an increase in pedestrian injuries and fatalities in recent years.
payload.subject: Pedestrian safety on 125th Street

tool_args.label: Heavy traffic congestion between Third and Eighth Avenues
tool_args.raw_text: Heavy traffic congestion occurs often between Third and Eighth Avenues. Congestion is a significant problem between Fifth and Second Avenues, traveling eastbound towards the bridge.

payload.claim_text: Heavy traffic congestion occurs often between Third and Eighth Avenues. Congestion is a significant problem between Fifth and Second Avenues, traveling eastbound towards the bridge.
payload.subject: Traffic operations on 125th Street

tool_args.raw_text: Tour buses and inter-city carriers cause congestion and take up curb space.

payload.claim_text: Tour buses and inter-city carriers cause congestion and take up curb space.
